---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Caspar Leung and Elizabeth Louie"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---


```{r initialization}
library(forecast)
library(ggplot2)

# Read the file skipping the first 2 rows
df <- read.csv("multiTimeline.csv", skip = 2, header = TRUE)

# Rename columns
colnames(df) <- c("Time", "Interest")

df$Time <- substr(df$Time, 1, 19)

# Check the first few rows
head(df)
summary(df$Interest)
```

```{r remove outlier}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Time, y = Interest)) +
  # geom_point creates the scatter plot dots
  # alpha = 0.6 makes the dots slightly transparent to show overlapping data
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Scatter Plot: Search Interest Over Time",
    x = "Time",
    y = "Interest"
  )

hist(df$Interest,
     main = "Histogram of BTS Search Interest",
     xlab = "Interest")

df[which.max(df$Interest), ]

ggplot(df, aes(x = Time, y = Interest)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  geom_point(
    data = df[df$Time == "2026-01-01", ],
    color = "red",
    size = 3
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Scatter Plot: Search Interest Over Time",
    x = "Time",
    y = "Interest Score"
  )

df_clean <- df[df$Time != "2026-01-01", ]

ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = Time, y = Interest)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Scatter Plot: Search Interest Over Time (Outlier Removed)",
    x = "Time",
    y = "Interest Score"
  )
```


```{r}
bts_ts <- ts(df_clean$Interest, frequency = 12, start = c(2021,3)) #it starts at 1800 so start = 18/24

BoxCox.lambda(bts_ts)
#variance stable

bts_log <- log(bts_ts)
hist(bts_log,
     main = "Histogram of Log-Transformed BTS Interest",
     xlab = "log(Interest)")
#fixed skew with log transformation

qqnorm(bts_log)
qqline(bts_log)
```

```{r}
bts_dec <- decompose(bts_ts, type = "additive")

plot(bts_dec$x,
     main = "Observed Series",
     ylab = "Interest",
     xlab = "Time")

plot(bts_dec$trend,
     main = "Trend Component",
     ylab = "Trend",
     xlab = "Time")

plot(bts_dec$seasonal,
     main = "Seasonal Component",
     ylab = "Seasonality",
     xlab = "Time")

plot(bts_dec$random,
     main = "Random (Residual) Component",
     ylab = "Random",
     xlab = "Time")

plot(bts_dec)
```

```{r}
residuals_ts <- na.omit(bts_dec$random)

plot(residuals_ts,
     main = "Residual Series",
     ylab = "Residuals",
     xlab = "Time")
acf(residuals_ts, main = "ACF of Residuals")
pacf(residuals_ts, main = "PACF of Residuals")
```
